runway_notes.07:
RWY 07 - grass, left-hand pattern (inference).
Elev 1788 ft; pattern altitude 2800 ft (1000 ft AGL).
Uncontrolled, no published frequency in apt.dat.
Near LFSB Basel TMA to the west - stay below TMA floors.
runway_notes.25:
RWY 25 - grass, right-hand pattern (inference).
Elev 1788 ft; pattern altitude 2800 ft (1000 ft AGL).
Uncontrolled, no published frequency in apt.dat.
Near LFSB Basel TMA to the west - stay below TMA floors.

metadata.source: X-Plane apt.dat (ARP, runway thresholds); Wikipedia DE for elevation and runway dimensions; VRPs are plausibility-based topographic inferences
metadata.verified_by: thWelly + plugin-author research; VRPs and pattern direction are plausibility-based - needs verification against current Skyguide VAC before flight
metadata.notes: ARP 47.5089 N / 7.95 E and runway 07/25 grass 530 m x 30 m taken from apt.dat and Wikipedia. The parallel grass strip (07L/25R) is omitted (used in parallel by gliders). VRPs E/W/S are topographic placeholders pointing to Frick, Eiken-Sisseln and Olsberg respectively, set to ~2.5 NM from ARP - these are NOT the published Skyguide VAC points. No INFO/AFIS frequency listed in apt.dat. Operator: Aero-Club Schupfart.
